title: Infinitory: Renewed
body:
## Development of this mod has stopped as of December 27, 2023. This mod will no longer receive releases for Minecraft 1.21 and above, and bug fixes for Minecraft 1.19-1.20. My new Inventory Mod has been released! Check it out [here](https://github.com/NotAHero04/inventory-mod).
This mod aims to feature the same features as Infinitory: Renewed, and will receive bug fixes and new features in the future. **Please note that transferring infinite inventories from Infinitory: Renewed to Inventory Mod, or vice versa is NOT supported, so you MUST store all of them in (at most) 127-item stacks in any kind of container (chests, barrels...) to prevent inventory loss.** ## Infinitory: Renewed is a sequel of [Furgl's Infinitory mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/infinitory) for Minecraft 1.17. This mod's features include: - Infinite stack count and stack size. No config, limit is for the weak! - A neat sorter to keep track of your ever inflating inventory easily. - (Optional, enabled by default) 3x3 crafting in the inventory screen. - (Since 1.4.6) A search bar.
